name: Beer Simulator
short_description: You are single? You have a very hard work and small salary? Then this game is just for you. In this game you can earn beer just by clicking on beer. Upgrade your beer, sell your beer, earn gold, purchase more beer without becoming an actual alcoholic.
detailed_description:
You are single? You have a very hard work and small salary? Then this game is just for you. In this game you can earn beer just by clicking on beer. Upgrade your beer, sell your beer, earn gold, purchase more beer AND ALL THIS IN YOUR COMPUTER BOX WITHOUT BECOMING AN ACTUAL ALCOHOLIC.

- Click beer, sell beer, upgrade your beer, click more beer, sell more beer, upgrade your beer even more.
- Customize your beer and surrounding environment with different beer skins and backgrounds.
- Compete with others beer enjoyers and upgrade your level to be #1 in the leaderboards.
